mood: Professional, trustworthy, calm, and efficient. B2B Enterprise CRM tailored for retail stores and approval departments.

rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings above text-2xl.
Never use Inter or default generic fonts.
Sales ID numbers, margin percentages, currency amounts, and dates MUST use mono font for vertical alignment and numerical legibility.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 and p-8 for modal/forms to prevent claustrophobia. For dashboards, use tight gaps (gap-4) but internal padding p-4 to p-6.
layout.radius: Subtle roundness. Maximum rounded-md or rounded-lg (6px to 8px). Avoid pill shapes for cards.
layout.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders (border-slate-200) instead of heavy drop shadows to create a 'flat, clean' look. Use subtle shadow-sm for floating elements.

components.kanban_board: Horizontal scrolling container. Columns should have a fixed width (e.g. w-80), background slate-50, and 1px border. Cards should be white, border-border, with hover translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-sm.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form primitives. Inputs must have clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900). File uploads should be drag-and-drop zones with dashed borders.
components.navigation: Left sidebar or top navbar with white background, subtle bottom/right border. Active state should have a solid primary left border or background highlight.
components.buttons: Flat, no gradient. Primary is dark slate (#0F172A). Ghost variants for secondary actions.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5. Keep it minimalist and line-based.

backgrounds.description: Retail appliance store background, ideal for Login page hero section with an overlay.

brand_logos.description: Placeholder minimal logo for brand settings (e.g. Arcelik, Bellona, Mondi representations if actual logos unavailable).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML+Tailwind for main structure. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions like dialogs, selects, tables, etc.
Implement light theme by default as per B2B daytime usage rules. Avoid dark mode to prevent clinical/cold feel.
Prioritize 'data-testid' on all interactive elements: inputs, buttons, kanban cards, and forms.
Make sure the Kanban board supports horizontal scrolling gracefully. Each column must handle its own vertical scroll if cards exceed screen height.
Ensure contrast ratio is accessible. Text sizes must follow the typography scale rules (e.g. no huge fonts for dashboard widgets, keep it dense and readable).
Do not use generic 'Inter'. Ensure the Google fonts 'Work Sans', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono' are imported and configured in Tailwind.
Avoid card shadow overload. Rely on 1px borders for defining bounds.
